summary: Phase 1.6 listing workflow mock fixtures: typed ProductDraft, Distributor, Opportunity loaders with stable UUIDs, schema validation, and P1.6 source policy enforcement. Mirrors seller-personas module layout. No API or DB calls.

interfaceChanges.description: Returns curated distributor catalog (6 records, 4 categories).
Returns opportunity cards with P1.6 filter fields (capital, category, dropship).
Returns golden ProductDraft seeds for tests and rules engine.
Fail-fast schema validation for all fixture sets.

mappings.criterion: loadDistributors returns at least 5 records with stable UUIDs across at least 3 categories
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::returns at least 5 distributors with stable UUIDs across at least 3 categories

mappings.criterion: fixture loader validates required schema fields
loadOpportunities returns at least 8 records with deterministic filter fields
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::returns at least 8 opportunities with deterministic filter fields

mappings.criterion: golden ProductDraft seeds with required schema fields
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::returns golden ProductDraft seeds with required schema fields

mappings.criterion: all fixture source enums are internal_curated or research only
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::uses only internal_curated or research sources (no marketplace_api)

mappings.criterion: MODULE.md documents listing-workflow loaders when module lands
no TikTok API calls and no Postgres writes
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_fixtures.test.ts::has no TikTok API or Postgres imports in fixture module entrypoint
